perturbation.original_text: The Board Member agrees to restrict dissemination of Confidential Information to those persons employed by the Board Member (or the Board Member’s employer) who require access to the Confidential Information so as to assist the Board Member in carrying out his or her duties to the HNBA and then only if such personnel has a clear understanding of the confidentiality obligations imposed by this agreement and also agrees to maintain the confidentiality of the Confidential Information in accordance with the terms hereof by signing this Agreement before any Confidential Information is disclosed.
perturbation.changed_text: The Board Member agrees to restrict dissemination of Sensitive Information to those persons employed by the Board Member (or the Board Member’s employer) who require access to the Private Data so as to assist the Board Member in carrying out his or her duties to the HNBA and then only if such personnel has a clear understanding of the confidentiality obligations imposed by this agreement and also agrees to maintain the confidentiality of the Confidential Information in accordance with the terms hereof by signing this Agreement before any Confidential Information is disclosed.
perturbation.explanation: The use of 'Sensitive Information' and 'Private Data' intermingled with 'Confidential Information' creates considerable confusion. It's undefined whether these terms are synonymous or distinct categories. By only mandating employees sign the agreement before 'Confidential Information' is disclosed, but not before 'Sensitive Information' or 'Private Data', the document implies differing levels of protection which contradicts earlier clauses, since those definitions includes all 'data', 'material', 'Sensitive Information' and 'Private Data'.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Board Member agrees to restrict dissemination of Sensitive Information to those persons employed by the Board Member (or the Board Member’s employer) who require access to the Private Data so as to assist the Board Member in carrying out his or her duties to the HNBA and then only if such personnel has a clear understanding of the confidentiality obligations imposed by this agreement and also agrees to maintain the confidentiality of the Confidential Information in accordance with the terms hereof by signing this Agreement before any Confidential Information is disclosed.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces 'Sensitive Information' and 'Private Data' alongside 'Confidential Information', but only mandates signed agreements before disclosing 'Confidential Information'. This creates a contradiction because the contradicted text uses those terms (Sensitive Information and Private Data), implying that they should all be treated the same. The changed text implies different levels of protection for each term, contradicting the original intent of comprehensive confidentiality, therefore creating a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: Such Confidential Information is publicly available or later becomes publicly available other than through a breach by the Board Member of this Agreement; or (b) Such Confidential Information is lawfully obtained by the Board Member from a third- party or parties independent of the HNBA prior to the Board Member’s disclosure
perturbation.changed_text: Such Sensitive Information is publicly available or later becomes publicly available other than through a breach by the Board Member of this Agreement; or (b) Such Confidential Information is lawfully obtained by the Board Member from a third- party or parties independent of the HNBA prior to the Board Member’s disclosure
perturbation.explanation: The change from 'Confidential Information' to 'Sensitive Information' in exemption (a) creates an inconsistency. Since only 'Confidential Information' is defined, it's ambiguous whether the exceptions apply equally to all data or whether 'Sensitive Information' has different exception conditions.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The HNBA agrees that the Board Member shall not be liable for any disclosure or use of any Sensitive Information if: HNBA Board of Governors Confidentiality Agreement Page 3 of 4 (a) Such Sensitive Information is publicly available or later becomes publicly available other than through a breach by the Board Member of this Agreement; or (b) Such Confidential Information is lawfully obtained by the Board Member from a third- party or parties independent of the HNBA prior to the Board Member’s disclosure; (c) The Board Member can demonstrate by documentary evidence or otherwise that such Confidential Information was known to him or her prior to its disclosure to the Board Member by the HNBA or was independently developed by the Board Member prior to such disclosure for purposes unrelated to his or her service as a Board Member; or (d) The Board Member was legally required to disclose the Confidential Information, provided that the Board Member (i) provides the HNBA and/or other disclosing party with written notice within five (5) days of knowing of such legal requirement so that the HNBA has the opportunity to pursue its rights regarding such potential disclosure, and (ii) utilizes reasonable efforts to obtain reliable assurances that the person receiving such Confidential Information will maintain the confidentiality of the same.
perturbation.justification: The change from 'Confidential Information' to 'Sensitive Information' in exemption (a) creates an inconsistency because only 'Confidential Information' is clearly defined in the contract. The Contradicted Text section includes both 'Sensitive Information' and 'Confidential Information', and the change introduces ambiguity as to whether the exceptions apply equally to both types of data or have different conditions, as stated in the Perturbation Explanation. This ambiguity creates a strong in-text contradiction under the 'Misaligned Terminology' definition.

perturbation.original_text: Once the purpose of the disclosure is achieved, the HNBA will instruct the Board Member to destroy all Confidential Information supplied to the Board Member by the HNBA.
perturbation.changed_text: Once the purpose of the disclosure is achieved, the HNBA will instruct the Board Member to destroy all Sensitive Data supplied to the Board Member by the HNBA.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'Confidential Information' to 'Sensitive Data' in the destruction clause, combined with earlier changes, leaves the Board Member uncertain as to which data they are obligated to destroy upon instruction. Since the definition of Confidential Information is still present, the definition and the requirements now have a unclarity due to the 'Sensitive Data' in the destruction clause.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Once the purpose of the disclosure is achieved, the HNBA will instruct the Board Member to destroy all Sensitive Data supplied to the Board Member by the HNBA. The HNBA will keep a copy in its files for a period of two (2) years after the completion of each Candidate’s specific request.
perturbation.justification: The change from 'Confidential Information' to 'Sensitive Data' in the destruction clause introduces a contradiction because the document now lacks clarity on which type of data the Board Member is obligated to destroy, since both terms are used. The original text instructed destruction of 'Confidential Information,' while the contradicted text instructs destruction of 'Sensitive Data.' This creates a misalignment of terminology that causes confusion and potential unenforceability, satisfying the definition of 'Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction'.
